extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder tool selection dialog in Studio Web, specifically the RPA workflow tab. A search box is visible, and under the "In current solution (1)" section, the available workflow "SNOW Assignee Lookup Automation" is listed for selection.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the "RPA workflow" tab if it is not already selected.
2. In the list under "In current solution (1)", select "SNOW Assignee Lookup Automation".
3. Optionally, use the "Search RPA workflows" field to find the workflow by name.

layout.rationale: Low text density (116 chars) or narrow layout
